case_title: BAIDU USA LLC VS. XUYANG LI

docket_entries.description: MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD (TRANSACTION ID # 58302101) FILED BY PETITIONER BAIDU USA LLC

MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-12-2016 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
ORDER GRANTING BAIDU USA, INC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD
NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD (TRANSACTION ID # 58302101) FILED BY PETITIONER BAIDU USA LLC HEARING SET FOR JAN-12-2016 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER BAIDU USA LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976. (302/EG)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER BAIDU USA LLC RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT LI, XUYANG $79,594.10 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,140.44 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $80,734.54, SEE SCANNED DOC

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dorna Moini of Sidley Austin LLP telephone number 650-565-7054 for Plaintiff.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER BAIDU USA LLC'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. Order and judgment signed in open Court.
